nasb.text: It is better to be humble in spirit with the lowly Than to divide the spoil with the proud.

esv.text: It is better to be of a lowly spirit with the poor than to divide the spoil with the proud.

cnv.text: 存謙卑的心與窮乏人在一起， 勝過與驕傲人同分戰利品。

ccb.text: 宁可谦卑地与贫寒人相处， 也不跟狂傲人共享战利品。

csbs.text: 灵里降卑、与卑微的人在一起， 好过与傲慢者同分战利品。
